history.text: Principality of Wallachia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Principality of Moldavia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
United Principalities appears in Romania's historical record.
Romania became independent from the Ottoman Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The Kingdom of Romania emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Great Union tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Socialist Romania appears in Romania's historical record.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Romania.

worthSeeing.title: Transylvania:
worthSeeing.text: Bran Castle, the Dracula legend, and medieval Saxon towns like Sibiu and Brasov.

worthSeeing.title: Painted Monasteries:
worthSeeing.text: Exterior frescoes on Bucovina's monasteries are among Europe's most remarkable art.

worthSeeing.title: Danube Delta:
worthSeeing.text: A UNESCO biosphere reserve with 300 bird species and reed-maze waterways.
